headline: Staffbase announces 2026 global VOICES Award winners; winning work points to trust and adoption as employee experience’s new differentiators
summary: Across this year's winners, including American Electric Power, ALDI SÜD, Australian Red Cross Lifeblood, and Bellway, the organizations leading employee experience have solved what most still can't. They reach every employee, including the frontline, and what sets them apart is whether their people adopt and trust the channels they've built. NEW YORK, June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Staffbase, the first AI-native employee experience platform, today announced the winners of its 2026 VOICES Awar
